case_id: NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Analyzer backtest configuration task

pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 includes SampleMACrossover as a built-in sample strategy demonstrating moving average crossover logic. Confirmed via NinjaTrader Support Forum and Ecosystem documentation (https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjascript-file-sharing/ninjascript-file-sharing-discussion/1126945-atsquadrostrategybase-nt8-strategy-foundation-with-samplemacrossover)

MSFT.Last.txt data file found at /examples/ninja_trader_env/data/MSFT.Last.txt. Data verified as real Yahoo Finance OHLCV data spanning 502 trading days with proper format (Date;Open;High;Low;Close;Volume). README.md confirms Yahoo Finance data imports correctly in NinjaTrader semicolon format.
MSFT.Last.txt first line: 20230103;243.08;245.75;237.40;239.58;25740000. January 2, 2023 was a US stock market holiday (New Year's Day observed), so the first trading day was January 3, 2023.

MSFT.Last.txt last line: 20241231;426.10;426.73;420.66;421.50;13246500. December 29, 2024 was a Sunday (market closed). Data extends through December 31, 2024 (Tuesday), including trading data for December 30-31.

Task description specifies 'Set Order quantity to 500 (default is 1)'. NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Analyzer uses default order quantity of 1 contract/share (confirmed via NinjaTrader documentation: https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/defaultquantity.htm). The expected configuration is to change from 1 to 500.

Task description specifies 'Set Slippage to 2 ticks (default is 0)'. NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Analyzer default slippage is 0 ticks (confirmed via NinjaTrader Support Forum: https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjatrader-8/strategy-development/1237571-slippage-in-strategy-analyzer). The expected configuration is to change from 0 to 2 ticks.

pi_items.metadata_value: Real daily OHLCV data for MSFT from January 2023 to December 2024
pi_items.verified_value: Real daily OHLCV data from Yahoo Finance, January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024
pi_items.source: Environment README.md confirms: 'Yahoo Finance data imports correctly in NinjaTrader semicolon format'. MSFT data verified with 502 trading days, proper OHLC relationships, realistic price range ($222.31 close low to $467.56 close high), and volume data.

pi_items.verified_value: Valid - All 502 records maintain proper OHLC relationships (High >= Open/Close >= Low)
pi_items.source: Analyzed MSFT.Last.txt: verified that 100% of records satisfy High >= Open >= Low and High >= Close >= Low. No OHLCV anomalies detected. Volume data ranges from 7.16M to 70.13M shares, consistent with real MSFT trading patterns.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses SampleMACrossover, a real built-in NinjaTrader 8 strategy, with MSFT as the instrument. Real Yahoo Finance OHLCV data is available spanning 502 trading days from January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024 (not January 2 to December 29 as claimed in the task). The task requires configuring execution parameters: Order Quantity from 1 to 500 shares, and Slippage from 0 to 2 ticks. These are realistic configuration values for stress-testing the strategy.
